nasb.text: Behold, as wild donkeys in the wilderness They go forth seeking food in their activity, As bread for their children in the desert.

esv.text: Behold, like wild donkeys in the desert the poor  go out to their toil, seeking game; the wasteland yields food for their children.

cnv.text: 這些貧窮人像曠野的野驢， 出外勞碌，殷勤尋覓食物， 野地為他們和他們的孩子供應食物。

ccb.text: 贫穷的人如荒漠中的野驴， 殷勤觅食，给儿女糊口。
